alerts.title: Iran fires drones nightly at Strait of Hormuz shipping since MoU signing
alerts.summary: Iran has conducted repeated drone attacks against vessels in the Strait of Hormuz each night since the US-Iran nuclear agreement was signed, per NBC reporting cited in ME Spectator Telegram (40.9K views, 2026-06-16). This represents direct escalation and potential violation of ceasefire terms, contradicting Tehran's public commitment to the deal.

alerts.title: White House signals nuclear deal conditionality: 'No weapons, no full relief'
alerts.summary: White House statement via ME Spectator (41K views, 2026-06-16) clarifies that Iran must eliminate nuclear weapons capabilities to receive full sanctions relief, reversing prior deal language and creating new dispute over implementation terms. Statement inadvertently suggests pathway to weaponization if relief withheld, escalating negotiation tensions.

alerts.title: Iran demands maritime control over Strait of Hormuz per leaked deal clause
alerts.summary: Axios reporting (via ME Spectator, 43.1K views) confirms MoU contains provision granting Iran management authority over 'shipping and maritime services' in Strait of Hormuz following consultations with Oman and regional states. Represents unprecedented concession over critical waterway and potential leverage for future blockade threats.

alerts.title: Israeli strikes kill 3-4 in Beirut suburbs; Iran renews 'harsh response' threat
alerts.summary: Israeli Air Force continues operations in southern Beirut suburbs and southern Lebanon with confirmed 3-4 civilian casualties (NBC News, Reuters, incidents feed 2026-06-17). Iran's military directly threatened 'harsh response' if southern Lebanon attacks persist, citing previous warnings that escalation would derail US-Iran nuclear agreement.

alerts.title: Iran-linked actors claim FBI drone system compromise; World Cup disruption threatened
alerts.summary: Iran-linked threat group claimed successful hack of US FBI unmanned aerial vehicle systems with stated intent to disrupt 2026 FIFA World Cup operations, per France 24 and CBS News reporting in global_metrics cyber_headlines. Separate claims of California water system compromise in retaliation for Israeli strikes indicate expansion of Iranian cyber operations into civilian critical infrastructure targeting.

analysis_note: US-Iran nuclear agreement framework is fragmenting under pressure from Israeli escalation in Lebanon, Iranian drone attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, disputed deal terms over sanctions relief and maritime control, and cyber retaliation threats; threat level remains at critical (9/10) with breakout timeline still estimated at 1-2 weeks if deal collapses.
